name: Chicken and Stuffing Bake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F. Prepare stuffing mix according to package directions but do not let it stand.
2. Spoon stuffing across the center of a 2-quart shallow baking dish. Arrange 3 chicken pieces on each side of the stuffing, overlapping if necessary.
3. Combine soup, milk and parsley. Pour over chicken. Cover with foil; bake for 15 minutes. Uncover; bake for 10 minutes or until chicken is no longer pink. Stir sauce before serving.
VARIATION: Add 1/2 cup each chopped carrot, celery and onion with seasoning packet while preparing stuffing mix.
